era-of-embers.note: Stage 2 of 3 — every shape worn in a thousand years, all at once. Söldís's ember moment triggers Stage 3.

biography.value:
Grafvitnir, Rot-Given-Shape — Level 7 Solo

Supernatural, Gargantuan

Stamina 200 (fresh pool) | Speed 6 | Size Gargantuan | Stability 6

Turns: 2 per round | Free Strike: 8 | EV: 108

What rises from the roots is not a wolf anymore and has not decided what it wants to be. Too many joints. Proportions that keep shifting. A face appears in one location and then another. Limbs emerge and dissolve. Grafvitnir wearing every shape he has worn in a thousand years of imprisonment, all at once, unable to choose.

Main Attacks

Tendril Strike (Melee, Reach 4): +5 vs Might; 11 damage.

Rot Pulse (Close Burst 3): +4 vs Presence; 8 damage, target Frightened until end of next turn.

Free Strike

Tendril Lash (Melee, Reach 4): +5 vs Might; 8 damage.

Villain Actions

Each usable once per encounter, max 1 per round; triggers at end of any hero's turn:

(VA1) Root Eruption: Three separate squares (each in range 10), +5 vs Agility; 10 damage, target Restrained (save ends).

(VA2) Rot Spread: Close Burst 4 becomes difficult terrain (Rot-saturated ground, 2 movement per square) until end of encounter.

(VA3) Reach and Grasp: Ranged 10, +5 vs Might; 12 damage, target Grabbed and takes 5 ongoing damage (escape TN 13).

Features

End Effect: When Grafvitnir starts his turn, he can take 10 damage to end one effect on him that a save ends.

Spectral Instability: Grafvitnir's shifting mass disperses every attack. He reduces all incoming damage by 3 (minimum 1 damage dealt). Each blow lands on a form that is already moving, already changing, absorbing the force across dozens of half-real shapes.

Undying Hunger: At the start of each of Grafvitnir's turns, he regains 5 Stamina unless the Ever-Ember is burning within the same zone.

Stage Transition (to Stage 3): When the flame is extinguished AND restored by Söldís, Grafvitnir's howl triggers Stage 3. He grows, roots pull more mass from the ground, the ceiling breaks apart.
biography.director:
TACTICAL GUIDANCE — STAGE 2:

Stage 2 is about managing the clock. The Ever-Ember must stay burning to suppress Undying Hunger. The party is fighting against time and entropy.

  • Grafvitnir fills the great hall. Roots spread across zones. Tendrils reach far.
  • Undying Hunger means the party is playing a losing game if they only deal damage — the flame IS the weapon.
  • VA1 (Root Eruption) locks heroes down. VA2 (Rot Spread) reshapes the battlefield. VA3 (Reach and Grasp) isolates a single target.
  • The Spectral Instability soak (-3 damage) is predictable — the party always knows. Feels fair while representing something that won't hold a shape.

KEY MOMENT — GRAFVITNIR EXTINGUISHES THE FLAME: During Stage 2, one precise tendril crosses the hall and wraps around the Ever-Ember shrine. The flame goes out. The hall goes dark. The cold comes in immediately. For one moment, the party is terrified.

KEY MOMENT — SÖLDÍS'S ACT: She opens the clay pot. Twenty-two years she has carried it. She tilts it over the shrine. The flame IGNITES — fills the shrine, rises up the walls, reaches for the ceiling. Warm, huge, unmistakably alive in the way only something kept alive by absolute refusal can be.

KEY MOMENT — LEW ARRIVES: The north gate opens. Lew runs through it. Behind him: Heitfolk, Green Heart elves, survivors from the settlements. His amber eye blazing. He shouts about the Green Heart growing. He asks: "What do you need me to do?" Then he is moving, joining the fight.

Expected Duration: 3–4 rounds before Söldís's act triggers the transition.
